title: TH17 cells contribute to uveitis and scleritis and are inhibited by IL-27/STAT1 in the retina. (4) Confocal microscopy

steps: Euthanize adult mice (C57bl/6 strain) by CO 2 and embed globes in cryomolds containing Tissue-Tek OCT compound and frozen on dry ice.
Cut frozen sections (10 μm thickness) with a Leica 3060S cryostat and collect on SuperFrost/ Plus slides and store at -70°C.
Prior to immunolabeling, allow slides to air dry under vacuum for 20 minutes.
Fix sections for 10 minutes in 4% formaldehyde in 1X PBS, wash repeatedly in 1X PBS, prior to blocking in 5% normal goat serum in immunolabeling buffer.
For paraffin embedded sections fix eyes in 10% Formalin (overnight).
Embed globe in paraffin and cut 5μm sections with a microtome.
Paraffinize sections used for antibody staining as follows:
Incubate in xylene for 3 minutes each (3X).
Incubate in 100% ethanol for 2 minutes (2X).
Hydrate by placing slide in 95% ethanol for 2 minutes (2X).
Then 70% ethanol for 2 minutes (2X).
Then 50% ethanol for 2 minutes (2X).
Then 30% ethanol for 2 minutes (2X).
Transfer sections to distilled water.
Block with normal rabbit serum for 1 hr.
Dilute rabbit polyclonal antibody to IL-27 to 5 and 10μg/ml in immunolabeling buffer (stock antibody =500ug/ml/ working dilutions of 1:50 and 1:100).
Incubate sections in diluted primary antibody overnight at 4°C in a humidified chamber.
Rinse sections in immunolabeling buffer (3X).
Then incubate in Alexa 568 conjugated goat anti-rabbit secondary antibody containing DAPI (1μg/ml) for 1hr at room temperature in an opaque chamber.
Wash sections in immunolabeling buffer (3X).
Then mount in anti-fading agent and cover with cover-slip. Primary antibody was omitted from sections used as negative controls.
Examine sections on a Leica SP2 laser scanning confocal microscope.
All images were collected under identical PMT detector settings.

TH17 cells are expanded by IL-2 during Uveitis or Scleritis and inhibited by IL-27/STAT1 pathways by Ahjoku Amadi-Obi, Cheng-Rong Yu, Xuebin Liu, Rashid M Mahdi, Grace Levy Clarke, Robert B Nussenblatt, Igal Gery, Yun Sang Lee & Charles E Egwuagu published in Nature Medicine on 17 Aug, 2007 https://dx.doi.org/10.1038/nm1585
creator: Protocols Importer
